response.step_by_step_log: 1. The video was analyzed and divided into two scenes: the introductory talk (00:00 - 02:46) and the song performance (02:46 - 04:59). 2. For the song segment, on-screen text was used to identify the song title '決意のソラへ' and the credits for the lyrics and composition. 3. Used the web search tool with queries '決意のソラへ ときのそら lyrics' and '決意のソラへ ときのそら english translation' to retrieve the lyrics and their translation. 4. Verified the lyrics with the search results and mapped them to the scene. 5. JSON was generated with the required fields, ensuring escape characters were used for the lyrics.
response.global_summary: The video features an introduction by Tokino Sora and a bear character named Anmo, detailing the 9th Anniversary Party and a new TV CM. This is followed by a live performance of her new song "決意のソラへ" (Ketsui no Sora e) in front of an audience.

scenes.description: Tokino Sora and Anmo discuss the 9th Anniversary Party and a TV CM.
Tokino Sora performs the song '決意のソラへ' in front of a live audience. Text overlays credit the composition/arrangement to 藤原彩豊 (Fujiwara Ayato) and lyrics to まつもとななみ (Matsumoto Nanami).
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
一度きりの私の物語は 運命を超えて煌めくんだ 行こう
ねぇ 私より私のことを わかってくれるキミの存在が 臆病で泣き虫な心に 勇気と言う魔法をかけたの
チクタク 時計の針だけが進む 立ち止まってちゃダメだ ソラ転び八起きがお決まりでしょ
一つ一つ重ねてきた 大切なアルバムをめくるように 一つ一つ叶えてきた今日まで その全てにキミがいてくれた 終わりのない夢を ずっとずっとずっとずっと 追いかけて行こう 行こう
ねぇ ここで笑い合えることが 何よりも大事な真実
チクチク イタズラなハートが痛む 空回り空(そら)回り 思考回路フル回転で よーいどん
泣いて泣いて泣いた夜も 大切な人生のストーリーだから 夢を夢で終わらせたくないんだ まだ見ぬ景色を見に行こうよ
もっともっと かがやいて 高く高く 飛び立とう 奇跡さえも越えて
一つ一つ重ねてきた 未来地図のページをめくるように
泣いて泣いて泣いた夜も 大切な人生のストーリーだから 夢を夢で終わらせたくないんだ まだ見ぬ景色を見に行こうよ
終わりのない歌を キミにキミにキミへと届け ずっとずっと誓うの 決意のソラへ 行こう
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
My story, just once, shines beyond fate. Let's go.
Hey, your presence, understanding me better than I understand myself, cast a magic called courage upon my cowardly and tearful heart.
Tick-tock, the hands of the clock just keep moving. It's no use stopping; falling and getting up is the norm, isn't it?
Like turning the pages of an important album we've layered one by one, you were there for everything up until today that we've made come true one by one.
Let's chase this endless dream forever and ever. Let's go.
Hey, being able to laugh here is the most important truth of all.
Prickly, my mischievous heart hurts. Spinning in the sky, spinning in the air, my thinking circuits are at full rotation. Ready, set, go!
Even the nights I cried and cried are an important story of my life. I don't want my dream to end as a dream. Let's go see a view I haven't seen yet.
Shine more and more, fly higher and higher, even beyond the miracle.
Like turning the pages of a future map we've layered one by one.
Even the nights I cried and cried are an important story of my life. I don't want my dream to end as a dream. Let's go see a view I haven't seen yet.
Send this endless song to you, to you, to you. I swear forever, let's go to the sky of determination.
